text: 201 - وَقَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «مَنْ جَامَعَ اِمْرَأَتَهُ وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ فَخَرَجَ اَلْوَلَدُ مَجْذُوماً أَوْ أَبْرَصَ فَلاَ يَلُومَنَّ إِلاَّ نَفْسَهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.201 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said: 'Whoever has intercourse with his wife while She is menstruating, and if the child born from that union is afflicted with leprosy or vitiligo, he should blame only himself.'
